# @representative/react-enterprise-app

React 19 TypeScript application shell using generated GraphQL contracts through an approved adapter.

Owner: team-app

## Responsibilities

- Own the React application shell, route composition, and runtime bootstrapping
- Consume GraphQL operations only through generated contract and adapter packages
- Coordinate authentication, rendering mode, and application-level error boundaries

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own domain policy logic
- Does not define GraphQL schema contracts
- Does not bypass public package exports or call vendor transport directly

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Use as the application entry package for browser-level vertical slices
- Import feature packages through their public exports
- Use generated GraphQL TypedDocumentNode operations through the adapter package
